race.comment: KING OF WESSEX (1) was narrowly beaten 3x in Adelaide metro company before being outgraded at Morphettville last time in Open company. Has the inside gate and this is his pet distance. Much better placed and is the one they have to beat. VEE ROD (7) wasn't disgraced in city class 62 at Oakbank. Missed a nose at Mt Gambier prior, and will find this more suitable. He can feature with average luck in the run. SCENIC HOST (5)  improved missing 1L here over a mile. Placed his only run here over 2000m and is ready for the step-up. CROWN AND ANCHOR (2) has won at Clare over 1800m in two of his last three starts. Has to push forward from a wide gate, but he'd be in the mix if that works out.  ALBLAZER (4) was outgraded at Warrnambool but missed a nose over 1815m at Mt Gambier prior. Has a tricky gate, but Crowther goes on and he can't be ruled out.
